article.headline: Carelton scores 24 points on career-high 3-pointers as Fire beat Storm 94-89
article.description: — Bridget Carleton had a career-high seven pointers and scored 24 points, Carla Leite added 20 points and the expansion Portland Fire beat the Seattle Storm 94-89 on Wednesday night in Commissioner’s Cup play.
article.linkText: Carelton scores 24 points on career-high 3-pointers as Fire beat Storm 94-89

article.story: PORTLAND, Ore. -- — Bridget Carleton had a career-high seven pointers and scored 24 points, Carla Leite added 20 points and the expansion Portland Fire beat the Seattle Storm 94-89 on Wednesday night in Commissioner’s Cup play. Leite also had 10 assists. Sarah Ashlee Barker added 12 points, and Karlie Samuelson scored 10 off the bench for Portland (8-9). Dominique Malonga had a career-high 28 points and 11 rebounds for the Storm (3-13). Up next Storm: At Phoenix on Saturday. Fire: At Chicago on Wednesday night. ------ AP WNBA: https://apnews.com/hub/wnba-basketball
